2603.20990.title: ECI: Effective Contrastive Information to Evaluate Hard-Negatives
2603.20990.paper_summary: Hard negatives play a critical role in training and fine-tuning dense retrieval models, as they are semantically similar to positive documents yet non-relevant, and correctly distinguishing them is essential for improving retrieval accuracy. However, identifying effective hard negatives typically requires extensive ablation studies involving repeated fine-tuning with different negative sampling strategies and hyperparameters, resulting in substantial computational cost. In this paper, we introduce ECI: Effective Contrastive Information , a theoretically grounded metric grounded in Information Theory and Information Retrieval principles that enables practitioners to assess the quality of hard negatives prior to model fine-tuning. ECI evaluates negatives by optimizing the trade-off between Information Capacity the logarithmic bound on mutual information determined by set size and Discriminative Efficiency, a harmonic balance of Signal Magnitude (Hardness) and Safety (Max-Margin). Unlike heuristic approaches, ECI strictly penalizes unsafe, false-positive negatives prevalent in generative methods. We evaluate ECI across hard-negative sets mined or generated using BM25, cross-encoders, and large language models. Our results demonstrate that ECI accurately predicts downstream retrieval performance, identifying that hybrid strategies (BM25+Cross-Encoder) offer the optimal balance of volume and reliability, significantly reducing the need for costly end-to-end ablation studies.
2603.20990.paper_summary_zh: 困難的負樣本在訓練和微調密集檢索模型中扮演著關鍵角色，因為它們在語義上與正樣本相似但不相關，正確區分它們對提高檢索準確性至關重要。<lb/>然而，識別有效的困難負樣本通常需要進行廣泛的消融研究，涉及使用不同的負樣本抽樣策略和超參數進行重複微調，這會產生相當高的計算成本。<lb/>在本文中，我們介紹了 ECI：有效對比信息，一種基於信息理論和信息檢索原則的理論基礎度量，能夠使實踐者在模型微調之前評估困難負樣本的質量。<lb/>ECI 通過優化信息容量與判別效率之間的權衡來評估負樣本，信息容量是由集合大小決定的互信息的對數界限，而判別效率則是信號幅度（困難度）和安全性（最大邊際）的和諧平衡。<lb/>與啟發式方法不同，ECI 嚴格懲罰在生成方法中普遍存在的不安全的假陽性負樣本。<lb/>我們在使用 BM25、交叉編碼器和大型語言模型挖掘或生成的困難負樣本集合上評估 ECI。<lb/>我們的結果表明，ECI 能夠準確預測下游檢索性能，並指出混合策略（BM25+交叉編碼器）提供了量和可靠性的最佳平衡，顯著減少了對昂貴的端到端消融研究的需求。
2603.20990.author: Aarush Sinha et.al.
2603.20990.authors: Aarush Sinha, Rahul Seetharaman, Aman Bansal
